framework.name: Visa Payment Passkey (FIDO-based Authentication)
framework.description: Federated FIDO solution using device-binding technology with Visa as the relying party. Enables trusted authentication for ecommerce with interoperability across Visa Token Service, Visa Secure, and Click-to-Pay. Potentially repurposable for agent authentication scenarios.
framework.raw_quote: Visa has developed its device-binding technology using a certified FIDO server and it's Visa Payment Passkey Service to enable Visa to be the relying party on FIDO authentication requests.
